description_long: This factory building complex consists of multiple interconnected structures, each with distinct architectural features and varying heights. The facades display a mix of modern and industrial design elements, including large rectangular windows, flat and slightly sloped roofs, and a combination of concrete, glass, and metal materials. Several buildings feature prominent vertical elements such as towers and cylindrical forms, while others have more traditional rectangular shapes. The complex includes rooftop installations, such as vents and possible machinery, indicating active industrial use. The color palette is primarily neutral, with shades of gray, beige, and white, accented by occasional red and green details. The overall layout suggests a functional, utilitarian approach typical of urban factory environments.
description: A multi-structure factory complex with modern industrial features, large windows, and rooftop machinery, rendered in neutral tones with some accent colors.
description_view_0: A frontal view showing the full lineup of interconnected factory buildings, highlighting their varied heights, window arrangements, and rooftop details.
description_view_1: A side view emphasizing the depth and alignment of the buildings, with towers and cylindrical structures visible in profile.
description_view_2: A rear view revealing additional architectural details, including more rooftop installations and the backs of the main structures.
description_view_3: An opposite side view showing the length of the complex, with the arrangement of buildings and their relative positions more apparent.
